description_en: Self-employed individuals whose net tax owing exceeds $3,000 (federal) or $1,800 (Quebec) must pay quarterly tax instalments to avoid interest charges.

calculation_methods.description_en: Pay 25% of your estimated current year tax owing each quarter
Pay 25% of your prior year net tax owing each quarter
Use CRA's pre-calculated amounts on your instalment reminder notices

tips_en: Set aside 25–35% of each invoice as a tax reserve
Open a separate savings account for tax instalments
Interest on late instalments is charged at the prescribed rate (currently ~8%)
The instalment holiday rule: no penalties if you paid your prior year balance in full
